name: vusys/laravel-nestedset
description: Nested set model implementation for Laravel 11+.

suggest.illuminate/bus: Required by Model::queueFixAggregates() — FixAggregatesJob uses Bus\Queueable and Foundation\Bus\Dispatchable.
suggest.illuminate/queue: Required by Model::queueFixAggregates() — FixAggregatesJob is dispatched onto a queue.

scripts-descriptions.check: Run every non-test gate (Pint --test, Rector --dry-run, PHPStan level 9) in one go. Halts on the first failure. Approximates what CI's static-analysis lane runs — pass this locally before pushing.
scripts-descriptions.test:matrix: Run the default test suite against each supported backend (sqlite, mysql, mariadb, pgsql) sequentially, halting on the first red cell. Requires running mysql/mariadb/pgsql servers matching the defaults in tests/TestCase.php::defineEnvironment(); sqlite needs nothing. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
scripts-descriptions.test:parallel: Run the default suite under ParaTest (4 workers). ~2.6x faster than `test` on the networked engines. Each worker gets its own database via TEST_TOKEN — on mysql/mariadb/pgsql create them first with `DB_CONNECTION=... php tooling/create-worker-databases.php` (sqlite needs nothing, `:memory:` is per-worker).
scripts-descriptions.fuzz: Run the seeded fuzzers (skipped by default). Configure via FUZZER_SEEDS / FUZZER_STEPS / FUZZER_RUNS env vars; set FUZZER_SEEDS=random for non-deterministic exploration.
scripts-descriptions.infection: Run mutation testing locally against the current backend (DB_CONNECTION). Defaults to all cores; pass `--threads=N` to limit. CI runs the same binary in a shard×backend matrix — see .github/workflows/infection.yml.
